prompt:
A notebook page with a simple star-hop plan: bright star dots connected by arrows leading toward faint constellation outlines, drawn next to a planisphere and a small red flashlight. The arrows and dots are visually clear, while any notes are intentionally illegible.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future astronomy kit aesthetic: soft low-light illumination, clean surfaces, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Make the arrowed star-hop diagram bold and centered for icon readability.
